sections.name: Teacher
sections.text: The passing of knowledge and traditions from generation to generation is a time-honored occupation. Teachers exist to strengthen their populations with literacy, history, and advanced sciences, but most of all with inspiration. Most teachers provide general knowledge so their students are well rounded, but some are experts or even masters of a single discipline. A teacher typically knows three languages in addition to Common. For academic encounters, a teacher is a 4th-level challenge.

abilities.name: Kitharodian Academy (Taldor)
abilities.text: : Famed bardic college teaching students of all social classes.

abilities.name: Magaambya (Nantambu)
abilities.text: : Ancient school with some of the world's greatest stores of arcane knowledge.

abilities.name: University of Lepidstadt (Ustalav)
abilities.text: : School primarily focusing on alchemy, medicine, and scientific study.

family.name: Scholars

sections.name: Uncommon Scholastic Disciplines
sections.text: Beside the life and natural sciences such as arcana, biology, botany, geology, oceanography, and zoology, demand is increasing in cities for more modern disciplines, like anthropology, economics, sociology, urban planning, and even art curation and forensic investigation.

family.text: True power comes from knowledge: the power to shape the growth of kingdoms by mere whispers, staying three steps ahead of adversaries, or even knowing which flora is best for creating untraceable poisons.

traits.name: Human
traits.text: A creature with this trait is a member of the human ancestry. Humans are a diverse array of people known for their adaptability. An ability with this trait can be used or selected only by humans.

traits.name: Humanoid
traits.text: Humanoid creatures reason and act much like humans. They typically stand upright and have two arms and two legs.

interaction_abilities.name: Font of Knowledge
interaction_abilities.text: The teacher can attempt to Recall Knowledge on any general subject with a +10 modifier.

interaction_abilities.name: Inspirational Presence
interaction_abilities.text: Any of the teacher's students in the aura gains a +1 circumstance bonus to Recall Knowledge.

traits.name: Aura
traits.text: An aura is an emanation that continually ebbs out from you, affecting creatures within a certain radius. Aura can also refer to the magical signature of an item or a creature with a strong alignment.

traits.name: Emotion
traits.text: This effect alters a creature's emotions. Effects with this trait always have the mental trait as well. Creatures with special training or that have mechanical or artificial intelligence are immune to emotion effects.

traits.name: Mental
traits.text: A mental effect can alter the target's mind. It has no effect on an object or a mindless creature.

traits.name: Two-Hand
traits.text: This weapon can be wielded with two hands. Doing so changes its weapon damage die to the indicated value. This change applies to all the weapon's damage dice, such as those from _striking_ runes.
